Package de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class PrettyPrinter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.PrettyPrinter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitor
@NullMarked public class PrettyPrinter extends Object implements Visitor
A configurable pretty printer for Java source elements originally from COMPOST.

    • print

      Entry method for this class. Be careful when using other method directly since they might need an enclosing block.
      Parameters:
      e - what to print

    • printFragment

      public void printFragment(SourceElement s)
      Alternative entry method for this class. Omits the trailing semicolon in the output.
      Parameters:
      s - source element to print
